summary.claim_boundary: No Seed Search; source-candidate requirements only; not corpus accession; not natural-corpus proof; not `.tlmr` format support.
summary.next_allowed_action: select externally licensed source URIs and create payload manifest rows with paired controls, then rerun external accession validation
summary.conclusion: The frozen-rank lane now has an acquisition matrix, but no source candidate is ready for the external manifest or replay.

source_candidate_requirements.external_manifest_integration_rule: External accession may consume this matrix; this matrix must not consume external accession outputs.

candidate_rows.ordinary_source_requirement: Externally published protocol or interchange specification text with explicit redistribution terms and stable retrieval metadata.
candidate_rows.rank_signal_target: headers, field names, delimiters, and common MIME-style values
candidate_rows.paired_shadow_rule: Construct vocabulary-disjoint protocol-shaped text with the same line, field, and delimiter histogram but no shared semantic labels.
candidate_rows.wrong_family_rule: Replay against schema/config rank entries only.

candidate_rows.ordinary_source_requirement: Externally published schema/configuration examples or specifications with explicit license and no Telomere/project tokens.
candidate_rows.rank_signal_target: keys, separators, structural punctuation, and common type labels
candidate_rows.paired_shadow_rule: Construct schema-shaped text with shadow keys and value labels while preserving punctuation and nesting depth.
candidate_rows.wrong_family_rule: Replay against protocol-header rank entries only.

candidate_rows.ordinary_source_requirement: Externally published tabular/ledger-like examples with explicit provenance, stable hashes, and no project-local identifiers.
candidate_rows.rank_signal_target: column labels, delimiters, timestamp/status motifs, and record separators
candidate_rows.paired_shadow_rule: Construct ledger-shaped text with shadow column labels and same row/field histograms.
candidate_rows.wrong_family_rule: Replay against protocol and schema rank entries only.

candidate_rows.ordinary_source_requirement: Externally licensed source-code snippets or fixtures with explicit license compatibility review and no target-project identifiers.
candidate_rows.rank_signal_target: language keywords, braces, imports/includes, comments, and separators
candidate_rows.paired_shadow_rule: Construct source-shaped text with shadow identifiers and equivalent token-class histograms.
candidate_rows.wrong_family_rule: Replay against non-source rank entries only.

stop_rules: Do not add payload bytes until license and redistribution review is explicit.
Do not replay until every ordinary candidate has paired shadow and random controls.
Do not treat source candidates as external corpus accession or natural-corpus proof.
Do not count same-family or project-token leakage as ordinary signal.
Do not build a rank table from target or held-out files.
